questions.subject: 英文
questions.unit: 106-3-四技二專-00共同科目 英文
questions.q: The newly found mummies in Egypt were well. Most parts were in good condition.
questions.explanation: Balanced; regular 們了解到大部分自閉症的人也會有無法專注的困難時, 【註】 balance(v.)(n.) 平衡 balanced(adj.) 均衡的 他們注意到這兩者 ( 選擇性注意力和自閉症 ) 之間的關 strike a balance between A and B:在 A 與 B 之間取得 聯。在某種意義上,自閉症就像是在收音機裡接收到所 平衡 有的電台 ( 或者電視上所有的頻道 ) 。那些有自閉症的人經 regular(adj.) 規律的 ↔ irregular(adj.) 不規律的 常面臨的挑戰是試著過濾所有的訊息只為了專注一件 做運動: do / take / have / get exercise 事。既然他們無法對焦到單一的頻道,他們聽 ( 接收到 ) 評閱指標 的會是同時朝向他們而來的各種 ( 龐大而雜亂的 ) 噪音,他 級分 說明 們被太多選擇 ( 項 ) 淹沒了。在這樣的情況,對他們而言, 4 2 個空格皆正確無誤。 專注 ( 在單一訊息 ) 當然會是極度地困難。 3 【 indicate:指示;指出。 single object:單一物品。 ignore 1 個空格正確,另 1 個空格部分正確。 = neglect = overlook:忽略 ( 視 ) 。 as to + N:至於;關於。 2 僅 1 個空格正確或 2 個空格皆部分正確。 nature: ( 在此處指 ) 本質或性質。 necessarily:必要的。 1 1 個空格錯誤,另 1 個空格部分正確。 theory:理論。 process(v):處理。 filter out:過濾掉。 deem: (1) 空白 ( 未書寫文字 ) 。 認為。 be aware of:意識到。 particularly:特別是。 learning 0 (2) 文字零碎、形同未答。 disorder:學習障礙。 appropriately:適當的。 at times:有 (3) 只抄題目或其他試題。 時候。 autism:自閉症。 in a way:在某種意義上。 jumble: (4) 內容完全錯誤。 混亂且雜亂的一堆 ( 東西 ) 。 be flooded with:被淹沒】

questions.q: We should take of setbacks in life and turn them into opportunities that will make us stronger.
questions.explanation: 我們應該善 ( 利 ) 用生活中的挫折,把它們轉化成讓我 Jack: 們變得更堅強的機會。 Lucy:它在講一個臉部有缺陷的男孩的故事。在他上 (A) 焦慮 (B) 參考;參照 (C) 優點;優勢 (D) 選擇 學期間,他教導了在他周圍的每一個人,如何去尊重 【 setback(n):挫折。 advantage(n):優點;優勢。 take 並欣賞和自己不同的人。 advantage of~ 善 ( 利 ) 用】 Jack:這 ( 本書 ) 一定非常激勵且溫暖人心。

questions.subject: 英文
questions.unit: 106-3-四技二專-00共同科目 英文
questions.q: The generous vegetable vendor, Chen Shu-Chu, wasn’t defeated by her childhood. Instead, she worked very hard and saved some money to help the poor.
questions.explanation: 既然你不能改變他的心意,你所能做的就是尊重他的 決定。 解答: Since(Now that) you can’t change his mind, what(all that/all) you can(have to) do is respect his decision. 【註】既然: since / now that What + S + have to do + is (to) + VR All (that) can do 評閱指標 級分 說明 能充分表達原文題意,對題材有絕佳的掌握, 4 句子結構及連貫性甚佳。文法及標點正確,用 字遣詞沒有或僅有極少不當之處。 能適切表達原文題意,對題材有良好的掌握, 3 句子結構及連貫性大致得當。文法及標點、用 字遣詞有少數不當之處,但不妨礙題意之表達。 僅能部分表達原文題意,句子結構不良或有 2 誤,且大多難以理解並缺乏連貫性。文法及標 點、用字遣詞有失當之處。 無法表達原文題意,句子沒有結構概念及連貫 1 性,無法理解。文法及標點、用字遣詞之錯誤 甚多。 (1) 空白 ( 未書寫文字 ) 。 (2) 文字瑣碎、形同未答。 0 (3) 只抄題目或其他試題。 (4) 內容完全離題或錯誤。

questions.q: After several days of investigation, the serial killer’s motive for murdering the young nurses unknown.

questions.q: On March 11th, 2011, one of the largest earthquakes on record in Japan triggered horrible tsunamis that wiped out many buildings and caused a lot of damage.

questions.subject: 英文
questions.unit: 106-3-四技二專-00共同科目 英文
questions.q: Jack: Have you read the book “ Wonder ”? Lucy: Yes! It hit the New York Times Bestseller list in 2014. Jack: Lucy: It tells a story of a boy with facial differences. During his school days, he has taught everyone around him how to respect those different from the rest of us. Jack: It must be very inspiring and heartwarming.
options: Did you find it in the bookstore?
Are you going to borrow it from the library?
questions.explanation: Jack:你有讀過「 Wonder 」 ( 奇蹟男孩 ) 這本書嗎? (A) 保育 (B) 預定 (C) 應得 (D) 保存 Lucy:有啊!它登上 2014 年暢銷書排行榜。

questions.subject: 英文
questions.unit: 106-3-四技二專-00共同科目 英文
questions.q: Karl: We’ve made a booking for tonight. The name is Karl Joy. Receptionist: Let me see. Oh yes. Karl: Is the room air-conditioned with a view of the sea? Receptionist: It is air-conditioned but none of our rooms facing the sea is available now. Karl: What a pity!
options: The book you ordered is ready.
I found your name on the list of awards.
How long do you intend to stay?
You can have a double room on the fifth floor.
questions.explanation: Karl:我們訂了今晚住的房間。姓名是卡爾喬伊。

questions.subject: 英文

questions.q: Cindy: Hi, Mom. Guess who came to our school today? Mom: Why don’t you just tell me? Cindy: It was the painter, Hsieh Kun-Shan. Mom: You mean the mouth painter with no arms, whose story is in your textbook? Cindy: Yep, that’s him! He’s amazing. I’ve learned a lot from his speech today.
options: You don’t really mean it, do you?
questions.explanation: Cindy:媽,你猜今天誰到我們學校?

questions.subject: 英文
questions.unit: 106-3-四技二專-00共同科目 英文
questions.q: Stephen: Hi, Judy! What do you think of Professor Wu? Judy: I like his teaching style. He always tries to get his ideas across by using lots of illustrations and logical statements. Stephen: It helps me to understand the content more easily.
options: I can’t agree with you more.
I’m not sure if I follow.
questions.explanation: Stephen:嗨,茱蒂!你覺得吳教授如何? (A) 忽視 ( 略 ) (B) 拒絕 (C) 反對 (D) 欣賞;感激 Judy:我喜歡他的教學方式。他總是試著用圖例和邏

questions.subject: 英文
questions.unit: 106-3-四技二專-00共同科目 英文
questions.q: Dad: Timmy, I heard that you cheated on the math test this morning. I can’t believe you did something so shameful! Timmy: Dad: It doesn’t matter how I knew it! The point is that you shouldn’t have done it. Timmy: I’m sorry, Dad! It won’t happen again, I promise!
options: How did you find out about it?
Is it what it’s all about?
What would happen if I could start all over again?
questions.explanation: 爸:堤米,我聽說今早的數學考試你作弊。我無法相 (B) 不要怪我。 【 blame sb. for sth. 】 信你會做出這麼羞恥的事! (C) 別拐彎抹角。 Timmy: (D) 別告訴任何人你有多成功。 爸: 我怎麼知道的不重要 。 ( 重要的是 ) 你不該這樣做! 【 on the edge of one’s seat:坐在椅子前緣專心的看和 Timmy:我很抱歉,爸爸。我答應你不會再發生了。 聽】 (A) 有這麼糟嗎? (B) 你怎麼會知道?

questions.q: George: Do you know that Jonathan and Lisa broke up last month? Sandra: No way! They were like a match made in heaven. What happened? George: Well, let’s just say Jonathan is such a smooth talker! Sandra: George: He should have been faithful to his girlfriend instead of seducing other girls. Sandra: Oh, no! He crossed the line and cheated on his girlfriend. That’s bad!

How will they deal with it?
Are they going to sue each other?

(A) 他們不會感到厭煩嗎? 【 highlight:在此處意指最精采或有趣的地方】 (B) 這有什麼不對嗎? (C) 他們要怎麼處理? questions.q: Ivy: The Summer Universiade is held every other year, and this year it is taking place in Taiwan. Melody: I know. Ivy: Me too. I think I’ll buy tickets to watch the games and cheer for my favorite team.
options: I have no choice but to cry.
Everybody is looking forward to it.
Tell me how you made it to the final.
I’m so excited about my upcoming trip.
questions.explanation: Ivy:世大運每兩年舉辦一次。今年是在臺灣 ( 舉行 ) 。 (22) 根據一個真實的故事,關於一名父親對抗社會偏見, Melody:我知道。 把她的女兒們 (23) 養育成堅強的摔角獎牌得主 ( 的故事 ) 。 Ivy:我也是。我會買票去觀看比賽,為我喜歡的隊 這位父親是名前業餘摔角選手,也得過全國冠軍,但是因 伍加油。 為生活重擔而放棄夢想。當他明瞭他再也無法為國家贏得 (A) 我不得不哭。 獎牌時,他發誓他未出生的兒子會 ( 完成他的夢想 ) 。在連 (B) 每一個人都很期待。 續有了四個女兒後,他 (24) 失望的再度放棄。 (C) 告訴我你是如何比到決賽的。 【 make it:成功達到】 有一天當他的大女兒 Geeta 和二女兒 Babita 痛打了兩 (D) 我對於即將到來的旅行感到興奮。 個大男孩回到家後,他突然了解了她們的天分,然後開 【 look forward to + N / Ving... 期待某事】 始培訓她們。在保守的印度社會,女人是被排除在許多 【 every other 表示「每隔一個」,因此 every other year 運動之外的,其中之一是摔角。 (25) 不管其他村民的批 即表示 「每兩年」 。 take place:舉辦。 S + have(has / had) 評,他還是堅持嚴格的訓練。一開始他的女兒痛恨父親 no choice(option) but + V:不得不。 look forward to + 非人道的對待,但很快的,她們理解父親是為她們好。 N / Ving... 期待某事】 幾年的訓練後, Geeta 成為首位替印度拿下女子摔角的世

questions.q: . And Dangal is definitely the one that keeps audience ____ on the meaning of life.
options: reflecting ▲ 下篇短文共有 5 個空格,為第 27 至 31 題,請依短文文意,選出一個最適合該空格的答案。 People commonly complain that they never have enough time to accomplish their tasks. Time seems to slip away before many planned chores can get done. 27 time management experts, the main reason for this is that most people fail to set their priority lists straight. They get stuck in trivial, time-consuming matters and never complete the important ones. One simple tip often 28 by those who have been considered “social elite” is to make a to-do list on a daily basis. The jobs on the list range from “the most essential” to “the least essential” and are checked regularly throughout the day to assess progress. Not only 29 an effective way to manage time, but it also gives people a sense of fulfillment when they see the jobs on the list done. To sum up, prioritizing our everyday work is the key. People who fail to do so often end the workday 30 a sense of uncertainty. Seeing their unfinished work piled up, they will be forced to handle tremendous anxieties. And it will gradually 31 to serious physical and mental health issues. Therefore, follow the tip, and people can become more productive and stay efficient at work.

the more we learn art, the more money we may have ▲閱讀下文,回答第 37-41 題。 What is “Selective Attention”? This term indicates that the way people tend to focus their attention on one single object or task and ignore other things around them. In fact, it’s impossible for most people to notice everything at once. A person pays attention to what he’s selected, though he is not necessarily conscious of his selection. There are many theories as to the nature of selective attention. One of them is that our brain can only process a certain amount of information at a time, so it automatically filters out whatever it considers unnecessary or unimportant. This is usually an unconscious process; that is, we are usually unaware of it. As for the degree of selective attention, it may vary from person to person. Some people have the lower level of selective attention, particularly if they have certain learning disorders, such as Attention Deficit Hyperactivity Disorder(ADHD). ADHD is a disorder that can make it challenging for students to stay appropriately focused on one single object, person, or idea. At times it may also give rise to their hyperfocus, namely their excessive concentration on something. Selective attention is also closely correlated with autism. Experts first noticed the connections between them when they realized that most autists tend to have difficulty with their ability to focus. In a way, autists are just like radios that pick up all the channels at once. Trying to filter out most of the channels in order to pay attention to just one is often the challenge faced by those with autistic disorders. They can’t tune in to a single station or channel, so all they can hear is a jumble of noise coming toward them at the same time. They are flooded with too many choices. In such a case, it is of course extremely difficult for them to concentrate.
